lines.text: You must be from the Kitty Rescue Team? I was the one who provided the lead about the mother cat. The kittens have arrived so early and the mother didn't even run away this time.
lines.quest_name: Save the World? Save the Cat!

lines.text: Can I take these two home with me? They would be the perfect company for my cat at my place. It’ll make it easier for Xiaoju, too.
lines.quest_name: Save the World? Save the Cat!
Save the World? Save the Cat!
